meta.summary: Bioawk v1.0 command-line runtime for awk-style processing of common biological text formats.
meta.description: Bioawk v1.0 command-line runtime for awk-style processing of common biological text formats.

test: bioawk --version 2>&1 | grep -Fx 'awk version 20110810' >/dev/null && { bioawk -c help 2>&1 || true; } | grep -F 'fastx:' >/dev/null && { bioawk -c help 2>&1 || true; } | grep -F 'sam:' >/dev/null
ldd "$(command -v bioawk)" 2>&1 | grep -F 'not found' && exit 1 || true

tmp=/tmp/taf-bioawk-fastx-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; trap 'rm -rf "$tmp"' EXIT; cd "$tmp"; printf '>seq1 comment one
ACGTN
>seq2
NNAA
' > seq.fa; printf '{print $name":"length($seq)":"revcomp($seq)}
' > fastx.awk; bioawk -c fastx -f fastx.awk seq.fa > fastx.txt; grep -Fx 'seq1:5:NACGT' fastx.txt >/dev/null; grep -Fx 'seq2:4:TTNN' fastx.txt >/dev/null; gzip -c seq.fa > seq.fa.gz; printf '{print $name}
' > names.awk; bioawk -c fastx -f names.awk seq.fa.gz > gz.txt; grep -Fx 'seq2' gz.txt >/dev/null

tmp=/tmp/taf-bioawk-fastq-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; trap 'rm -rf "$tmp"' EXIT; cd "$tmp"; printf '@r1 some comment
ACGT
+
IIII
@r2
TTAA
+
HHHH
' > reads.fq; printf '{print $name":"$seq":"length($qual)}
' > reads.awk; bioawk -c fastx -f reads.awk reads.fq > reads.txt; grep -Fx 'r1:ACGT:4' reads.txt >/dev/null; grep -Fx 'r2:TTAA:4' reads.txt >/dev/null

upstream.name: bioawk
upstream.license: Lucent permissive license in bundled BWK awk source; upstream repository has no separate SPDX LICENSE file
upstream.citation: No dedicated bioawk paper is listed upstream; cite the upstream project and version.
